Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic is present. Represented by Luisa Cabrera.
Attorney Margaret Dematteo for the plaintiff.
Defendant Vincent Ruta is present.
Attorney Bao Tran Dang appearing for the defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem , litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 504A, for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of July 20, 2015 remains on calendar. (501/jpt)
